title: Ender Dragon Battle(mode 2)
description: Replaces "Boss" with C418's "Battlemode 2" from Legacy Console's Battle Mini-Game!
body:
## Ever wish the Ender Dragon got an official, proper boss theme for her fight to the death in the End? Well, we don't have that - so this is probably the next best thing!


This pack simply replaces the vanilla track that plays during the Ender Dragon fight ("[Boss](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NBBxG9biq1Q)") with C418's "[Battlemode 2](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Imt1rM8WDCo)" from _Legacy Console's Battle Mini-Game!_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1TCA1W0s1dc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

⠀

Want something more epic? Give [_Broken Heart of Ender (Dragons)_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/broken-heart-of-ender-(dragons)) a try!

⠀

_All rights for "Battlemode 2" belong to C418 / Mojang / 4J Studios_

_Amazing restoration done by [@unreleasedLCE](https://www.youtube.com/@unreleasedlce)!_

__This pack should* function in most previous and future versions of Minecraft (1.9 and onward), as long as the method in which Resource Packs change audio files remains the same.__
* if issues arise with any minecraft version (1.9+) please let me know!
